commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Thus says the LORD, your redeemer, the Holy One of Israel; For your sake I have sent to Babylon, and have brought them all down as fugitives, and the Chaldeans, whose song is in their ships. Septuagint, "fugitives. "Theodotion, "strong ones. Septuagint, "shall be bound in ships "to be sent beyond the Caspian Sea. (Calmet) Cyrus was victorious for the sake of God's people; for he will not neglect his Church. (Worthington).
